title: Operation Technician (12 hours)
description:
• Troubleshoot and resolves technical problem when necessary.
  • Operate valves and pumps to admit or drain specified amounts of materials, impurities, or treating agents to or from equipment
  • Flush or clean equipment, using steam hose or mechanical reamer
  • Draw samples of product and sends to laboratory for analysis
  • Perform general clean up and maintain good housekeeping in order to keep working areas clean, organized, and safe
  • Patrol and inspect equipment or unit to detect leaks and malfunctions
  • Weigh or measure specified amounts of materials
  • Read, comprehend, and follow written and oral instructions, safety rules, operating procedures and product recipes
  • Load and unload tank trucks and drums containing hazardous and non-hazardous materials
  • Perform incidental maintenance as required to troubleshoot processes and to keep processes running properly
  • Lock out processing equipment to make sure maintenance can safely repair processing equipment
  • Be an active Emergency Response Team member.
  • Diploma or Degree in any field
  • A quick learner, a good team player as well as possess the aptitude to work well independently
  • Physically fit
  • Able to work 12 hour rotating shifts
  • Familiar with the petroleum and chemical products handled and the terminal operating system in the control room, tank farm and jetties
  • Candidate must be open to work in open space environment, able to handling tasks that require climbing or working at heights by using ladder.
  • Working Hours :  12 hrs rotating shift (8am to 8pm/8pm to 8am)
  • Shift pattern Shifting schedule is 3 2 2 3 pattern

By sending your job application/resume to us, it shall be deemed that you have agreed and hereby give your consent to MANFIELD in collecting, using and/ or disclosing your personal data for the purpose of accessing and processing your job application and/ or for future job opportunities within MANFIELD and/ or with the client(s) of MANFIELD. If you wish to withdraw your consent, please notify us. Kindly visit our company website for more information on the Privacy Policy.

WE REGRET TO INFORM THAT ONLY SHORTLISTED CANDIDATES WILL BE NOTIFIED

postedCompany.description:
Manfield is a professional Headhunting, Recruitment and Consultancy Company first established in Singapore since 1995, we have also expanded our presence to Mainland China since 2005.

Our consultants in Manfield possess in-depth knowledge and expertise of industries that they specialise in.

With more than 100,000 unique profiles in our database, our dedicated team is constantly to source, interview and shortlist the ideal people for organisations, and have the passion to deliver effective human capital solutions. We are passionate to serve to our best capacity. We uphold professional values and instill confidence in our clients, including establishing long term business relationships with them.
